标题:
CELINE 25SS Spring/Summer Latest Racer Series Sneakers  
Popular among celebrities and fashion bloggers.  
Classic and timeless design, versatile for sporty or casual looks, enhancing overall style effortlessly.  
Ergonomic fit ensures comfort and breathability for spring and summer wear.  
Perfect for shopping, travel, or sports.  
Features 3D embroidered logo, high-gloss calf leather with breathable fabric, and original sole mold.  
Sizes: 35-41 (sizes 40 and 41 are custom orders, no returns or exchanges).
